summary: Good‑sound recording of an energetic 1985 show highlighted by a fabulous Terrapin Station and smoking Crazy Fingers.
review: The reviewer describes the performance as great, praising the first set and calling the second‑set opener “Women Are Smarter” a treat. Standout moments include Terrapin Station, Crazy Fingers, Throwing Stones/Turn On Your Love Light, and a superb vocal greeting from Jerry. The audio is noted simply as “good sound,” with no major technical complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives strong positive feedback on the musical performance and mentions good‑sound quality, leading to a high overall rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes “good sound” with no reported dropouts or muddiness; source type not specified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is described as fabulous, and the second‑set opener “Women Are Smarter” is called a treat, leading into a string of high‑energy numbers that keep the momentum strong.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal greeting (“Hello”) sounded good according to the reviewer.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned wearing a pink Alligator T‑Shirt (no performance comment).
